languages.text: Платформы, несущие нас ввысь, уже поравнялись с вратами анфилад первых этажей Музеона, как вдруг чудовищной силы удар сотряс гробницу до основания. По поверхности планеты неподалеку пришелся очередной артиллерийский удар флагмана, и проклятая пирамида оказалась недостаточно прочной, чтобы его пережить. Я успел увидеть, как по ее поверхности зазмеились наливающиеся ядовитой зеленью трещины, а затем нестерпимый свет затопил все вокруг, временно лишив меня зрения.

The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.
languages.original_text: Платформы, несущие нас ввысь, уже поравнялись с вратами анфилад первых этажей Музеона, как вдруг чудовищной силы удар сотряс гробницу до основания. По поверхности планеты неподалеку пришелся очередной артиллерийский удар флагмана, и проклятая пирамида оказалась недостаточно прочной, чтобы его пережить. Я успел увидеть, как по ее поверхности зазмеились наливающиеся ядовитой зеленью трещины, а затем нестерпимый свет затопил все вокруг, временно лишив меня зрения.

traits.locale_text: The platforms that carried us upwards had already drawn level with the gates leading into the suites of the Museion's lower floors when a formidable blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poison-green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

When another charge struck its very centre, the crystal could no longer withstand the onslaught. With a heinous crack echoed by the growing rumble of the devastating barrage of artillery blasts coming from somewhere up above, the cursed artefact exploded, flooding everything around it with unbearable light.

The platforms that carried us upwards had already drawn level with the gates leading into the suites of the Museion's lower floors when a formidable blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poison-green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

languages.text: 承载我们上升的浮台，升至了陈列馆下层回廊大门的高度。就在这时，一阵可怕的冲击撼动了整座墓穴。旗舰的轨道炮再度开火，命中了不远处的行星地表。那座被诅咒的金字塔显然不足以承受这样的打击。我所见的最后一幕，是一道道裂缝在金字塔表面蔓延，其中涌动着阴森诡异的绿光。紧接着，一阵令人无法忍受的强光吞没了一切，我陷入了暂时的失明。
languages.original_text: The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

traits.locale_text: 承载我们上升的浮台，升至了陈列馆下层回廊大门的高度。就在这时，一阵可怕的冲击撼动了整座墓穴。旗舰的轨道炮再度开火，命中了不远处的行星地表。那座被诅咒的金字塔显然不足以承受这样的打击。我所见的最后一幕，是一道道裂缝在金字塔表面蔓延，其中涌动着阴森诡异的绿光。紧接着，一阵令人无法忍受的强光吞没了一切，我陷入了暂时的失明。

languages.text: Las plataformas que nos llevaban arriba ya estaban a la par con las puertas que llevaban a los niveles inferiores del Museion cuando un terrible golpe sacudió la cripta entera. Otra de las descargas de artillería de la nave insignia había impactado en la superficie del planeta cerca de nuestra posición, y la pirámide maldita no era suficientemente resistente como para aguantar. Lo último que vi fue una serie de grietas que recorrían la superficie y se llenaban con una enfermiza luz verde. Después, un resplandor cegador lo inundó todo y quedé cegado temporalmente.
languages.original_text: The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

traits.locale_text: Las plataformas que nos llevaban arriba ya estaban a la par con las puertas que llevaban a los niveles inferiores del Museion cuando un terrible golpe sacudió la cripta entera. Otra de las descargas de artillería de la nave insignia había impactado en la superficie del planeta cerca de nuestra posición, y la pirámide maldita no era suficientemente resistente como para aguantar. Lo último que vi fue una serie de grietas que recorrían la superficie y se llenaban con una enfermiza luz verde. Después, un resplandor cegador lo inundó todo y quedé cegado temporalmente.

languages.text: Les plateformes s'étaient élevées jusqu'aux portes menant aux galeries des étages inférieurs du Muséion lorsqu'un terrible choc ébranla la crypte jusqu'à ses fondations. Un autre tir d'artillerie du vaisseau amiral avait frappé la surface de la planète non loin de nous, et cette maudite pyramide se révéla trop fragile pour y résister ; des fissures apparurent à sa surface et commencèrent à se remplir d'une lueur verte toxique. Puis nous fûmes noyés dans une lumière insoutenable qui m'aveugla temporairement.
languages.original_text: The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

traits.locale_text: Les plateformes s'étaient élevées jusqu'aux portes menant aux galeries des étages inférieurs du Muséion lorsqu'un terrible choc ébranla la crypte jusqu'à ses fondations. Un autre tir d'artillerie du vaisseau amiral avait frappé la surface de la planète non loin de nous, et cette maudite pyramide se révéla trop fragile pour y résister ; des fissures apparurent à sa surface et commencèrent à se remplir d'une lueur verte toxique. Puis nous fûmes noyés dans une lumière insoutenable qui m'aveugla temporairement.

languages.text: Bizi yukarı taşıyan platformlar, mahzeni temeline kadar sarsan korkunç bir darbeyle sarsıldı. Museion'un alt katlarının galerilerine açılan kapılarla aynı hizaya geldiler. Sancak gemisinin top atışlarından bir diğeri, gezegenin yüzeyine yakın bir yerde isabet etmişti ve lanetli piramit buna dayanacak kadar sağlam değildi. Gördüğüm son şey, yüzeyi boyunca uzanan ve zehirli yeşil bir parıltıyla dolan çatlaklardı. Sonra her yeri dayanılmaz derecede parlak bir ışık kapladı ve geçici olarak kör oldum.
languages.original_text: The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

traits.locale_text: Bizi yukarı taşıyan platformlar, mahzeni temeline kadar sarsan korkunç bir darbeyle sarsıldı. Museion'un alt katlarının galerilerine açılan kapılarla aynı hizaya geldiler. Sancak gemisinin top atışlarından bir diğeri, gezegenin yüzeyine yakın bir yerde isabet etmişti ve lanetli piramit buna dayanacak kadar sağlam değildi. Gördüğüm son şey, yüzeyi boyunca uzanan ve zehirli yeşil bir parıltıyla dolan çatlaklardı. Sonra her yeri dayanılmaz derecede parlak bir ışık kapladı ve geçici olarak kör oldum.

languages.text: Die Plattformen, die uns nach oben brachten, hatten bereits die Tore erreicht, die zu den Galerien auf den unteren Ebenen des Museions führten, als eine heftige Explosion die Krypta bis auf ihre Grundfesten erschütterte. Ein weiterer Artillerieangriff des Flaggschiffes hatte den Planeten nicht weit von uns getroffen, und die verfluchte Pyramide war nicht robust genug, um ihm standzuhalten. Das Letzte, was ich sah, waren Risse an der Oberfläche der Pyramide, die sich mit einem giftig grünen Schimmer füllten. Dann brach ein gleißendes Licht aus ihnen hervor, das mich vorübergehend blendete.
languages.original_text: The platforms that carried us upward had already drawn level with the gates leading into the galleries of the Museion's lower floors when a terrible blow shook the crypt to its foundation. Another of the flagship's artillery strikes had hit the planet's surface not far from us, and the accursed pyramid proved insufficiently sturdy to withstand it. The last thing I saw was cracks running along its surface, filling with a poisonous green glow. Then an unbearably bright light flooded everything, and I was temporarily blinded.

Ein weiterer Artillerieangriff des Flaggschiffes hatte den Planeten nicht weit von uns getroffen, und die verfluchte Pyramide war nicht robust genug, um ihm standzuhalten. Das Letzte, was ich sah, waren Risse an der Oberfläche der Pyramide, die sich mit einem giftig grünen Schimmer füllten. Dann brach ein gleißendes Licht aus ihnen hervor, das mich vorübergehend blendete.

languages.text: 別の弾がその中心に命中すると、水晶はもはやその猛攻に耐えられなくなった。どこか上空から轟く大砲の砲撃の轟きと共に、水晶は悪夢のような音を立てて爆発し、その周囲を耐え難い光が包んだ。
languages.original_text: When another charge struck its very centre, the crystal could no longer withstand the onslaught. With a heinous crack echoed by the growing rumble of the devastating barrage of artillery blasts coming from somewhere up above, the cursed artefact exploded, flooding everything around it with unbearable light.

traits.locale_text: 別の弾がその中心に命中すると、水晶はもはやその猛攻に耐えられなくなった。どこか上空から轟く大砲の砲撃の轟きと共に、水晶は悪夢のような音を立てて爆発し、その周囲を耐え難い光が包んだ。
